name: Aniket Magare
tagline: Turning complex problems into clear roadmaps and delivering results that matter.
about:
Project & Product Manager with 2+ years driving end-to-end software delivery across B2B healthtech and edtech environments, executing full product lifecycle ownership across Agile, Waterfall, and hybrid delivery models with PMO governance and data-informed decision-making.

Led a clinically validated mental health monitoring MVP from discovery through production launch — owning competitive research across 8+ market tools, clinical stakeholder alignment, compliance requirements, and an 18-member engineering team. Delivered a 40% improvement in user task completion through A/B-tested UX redesign and lifted on-time delivery to 95% through structured sprint KPIs and capacity planning. Experienced in leading cross-functional teams of up to 35 members, backlog prioritization, roadmap ownership, and change management across product and enterprise environments.
